Package org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.standalone

Interface StandaloneSonarLintEngine

  • All Superinterfaces:
    SonarLintEngine
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    StandaloneSonarLintEngineImpl
    public interface StandaloneSonarLintEngine
extends SonarLintEngine
    Entry point for SonarLint in standalone mode.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      AnalysisResults analyze​(StandaloneAnalysisConfiguration configuration, IssueListener issueListener, ClientLogOutput logOutput, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Trigger an analysis
      Collection<StandaloneRuleDetails> getAllRuleDetails()
      Deprecated.
      use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() instead
      Optional<StandaloneRuleDetails> getRuleDetails​(String ruleKey)
      Deprecated.
      use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() and RulesService.getStandaloneRuleDetails(GetStandaloneRuleDescriptionParams) instead
      void stop()  

      • Methods inherited from interface org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.common.SonarLintEngine

        declareModule, fireModuleFileEvent, getPluginDetails, stopModule

    • Method Detail

      • stop

        void stop()

      • getRuleDetails

        @Deprecated(since="8.12")
Optional<StandaloneRuleDetails> getRuleDetails​(String ruleKey)
        Deprecated.
        use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() and RulesService.getStandaloneRuleDetails(GetStandaloneRuleDescriptionParams) instead
        Return rule details.
        Parameters:
        ruleKey - See Issue.getRuleKey()
        Returns:
        Rule details
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if ruleKey is unknown
        Since:
        1.2

      • getAllRuleDetails

        @Deprecated(since="8.16")
Collection<StandaloneRuleDetails> getAllRuleDetails()
        Deprecated.
        use RulesService.listAllStandaloneRulesDefinitions() instead
        Return rule details of all available rules for SonarLint standalone mode. For now, excluding hotspots and rule templates.

      • analyze

        AnalysisResults analyze​(StandaloneAnalysisConfiguration configuration,
                        IssueListener issueListener,
                        @Nullable
                        ClientLogOutput logOutput,
                        @Nullable
                        ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Trigger an analysis
